app.name: Studium
app.tagline: Learning, schedules, assignments, and analytics in one place.

states.notFound: The requested page was not found.

login.description: Sign in to continue to your Studium dashboard.
login.title: Sign in to Studium

layout.description: Organize teaching, study, and progress in a calm, structured space.

analytics.description: See results, risks, and activity without leaving the platform.
analytics.title: Follow progress

assignments.description: Share materials, collect submissions, and review work faster.
assignments.title: Manage coursework

schedule.description: Keep lessons, deadlines, and updates in one clear view.
schedule.title: Stay on schedule

mfa.description: Complete the verification challenge to continue.
mfa.title: Multi-factor verification

passwordReset.description: Request a reset link or confirm a new password to restore access.

register.description: Fill in your details to access the platform.
register.title: Create your account

suggestions.dashboard: Open your dashboard to return to your current work.
suggestions.schedule: Check your schedule to continue from today's plan.

student.description: See today's lessons, deadlines, grades, and available tests at a glance.

teacher.description: Daily lessons, review queues, at-risk groups, and active teaching workloads.

admin.description: Platform-wide overview of users, education structure, risk, and recent audit activity.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.studentDescription: Self-service progress, subject performance, and risk monitoring for the current student.
analytics.teacherDescription: Teaching workload, published academic assets, and risk signals across taught groups.
analytics.adminDescription: Administrative analytics overview with group and subject drilldowns.

assignments.deletePermanentConfirm: Delete this assignment permanently? This action cannot be undone.
assignments.createFromCourseOnly: Assignment creation is available from the course page.
assignments.empty: No assignments are available in the current scope.
assignments.managementDescription: Plan assignment work, track submissions, and review results in one place.
assignments.reviewDescription: Review pending submissions, leave comments, and publish grades.
assignments.studentDescription: Assignments available to the current student, including details and submission status.
assignments.groupSearchHint: Enter at least two characters to find a group.
assignments.noSubmissionsToGrade: There are no submissions ready for grading.
assignments.noSubmissionsToReview: There are no submissions available in the current review queue.
assignments.submissionClosed: This assignment is closed. New submissions are disabled.
assignments.submissionsDescription: Review submissions by group, open a concrete work, and grade it in one place.
assignments.removeAssignmentFileWarning: Students may lose access to this material. Remove file?

assignments.previewUnavailable: Inline preview is not available for this file type.
assignments.notAvailableForGroup: This assignment is not available for your group.
assignments.subjectCreateDescription: Create assignments inside the subject so work stays tied to course context.
assignments.topicCreateDescription: Create assignments inside this topic to keep learning work anchored to the lesson flow.

testing.deletePermanentConfirm: Delete this test permanently? This action cannot be undone.
testing.detailDescription: Review test availability, attempt settings, and result status.
testing.empty: No tests are available in the current scope.
testing.managementDescription: Manage tests, questions, answers, and publication states in one flow.
testing.pointsExceeded: Cannot publish: total question points exceed test max points.

testing.invalidConfigurationWarning: Saved question configuration is invalid. Review the fields before saving.

testing.questionPickerHint: Create a question first to attach answers.
testing.noQuestions: No questions have been added yet.
testing.acceptedAnswersHint: Add one accepted answer per line.
testing.incompleteQuestionConfiguration: Question configuration is incomplete. Contact the teacher.
testing.fileUploadNotAvailableYet: File upload for this answer type is not available yet.
testing.attemptStartDescription: Read the test details first. Questions will appear only after you start the attempt, and the timer will begin immediately.
testing.attemptCompletedDescription: This attempt is already finished. You can start a new one only if another attempt is allowed.
testing.timeExpiredSubmitting: Time is up. Finishing your attempt...

validation.twoOptionsRequired: Add at least two answer options.
validation.multipleChoiceCorrectRequired: Choose at least one correct answer.
validation.acceptedAnswerRequired: Add at least one accepted answer.
validation.matchingPairsRequired: Add at least two complete matching pairs.
validation.orderingItemsRequired: Add at least two ordered items.
validation.blankAnswersRequired: Add accepted answers for every blank.
validation.atLeastOneQuestion: Add at least one question before saving or publishing the test.

testing.studentContractNote: Open a test from the dashboard or topic list to start an attempt and submit the result.

academicCenter.description: Open the academic areas where subjects, groups, and teachers are managed.

subjects.title: Learning structure

groups.title: Academic groups
groups.description: Track groups, subject coverage, and the shared learning path for each group.

schedule.description: Move from subject planning to calendar coordination without leaving the academic module.

education.searchDescription: Search across subjects, groups, and topics to continue where you left off.

education.createSubjectDescription: Create the subject first. Groups and teachers are configured from the subject settings after it exists.

conflictMessages.DUPLICATE_LESSON_CONFLICT: This lesson duplicates another lesson in the same schedule position.
